subcodes.first_line: The Book sent down by the Wronged One from His Praiseworthy Station, summoning all unto God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting. Say: O [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم فی مقامه المحمود و یدع الکل الی الله المهیمن القیوم قل یا
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @station of the Manifestation of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
